sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Wipro appoints global tech veteran Laura Marie Miller to board for five-year term
feed.summary: Wipro Limited has announced the appointment of Laura Marie Miller to its Board of Directors for a five-year term, effective April 1, 2026, pending shareholder approval. Miller brings over two decades of executive leadership experience, having guided global organizations through transformation and performance improvement, with a focus on technology-led and AI-driven change. She has held senior roles at Macy's, InterContinental Hotels Group, and First Data, and has significant public company board experience with EVO Payments, LGI Homes, NCR Voyix, and Ahold Delhaize.

feed.title: US Fed ends 2018 enforcement action against Wells Fargo
feed.summary: The US Federal Reserve Board has concluded its 2018 enforcement action against Wells Fargo, stating the bank fulfilled all regulatory requirements after a period of heightened scrutiny due to misconduct incidents. Initiated due to issues like unauthorized accounts and fees, the action included a $1.95 trillion asset cap that was lifted in 2025. CEO Charlie Scharf, who took over in 2019, has led efforts to address compliance failures.

feed.title: Associate Bank Financial Advisor
feed.summary: Wells Fargo is seeking an Associate Bank Financial Advisor in Reading, PA, within its Wealth and Investment Management division. The role involves participating in a training program, assessing client financial needs, and meeting Loan Originator requirements. Candidates need at least 6 months of customer service or similar experience and must have successfully completed the SIE exam, with FINRA Series 7 and 66 being desired.

feed.title: Advisor moves: Raymond James lands $800M New York team, Farther adds $185M team in Georgia
feed.summary: Raymond James and Farther have announced significant recruitments this week. Raymond James Financial Services added a six-advisor group, OakWood Financial Services, from Commonwealth Financial Network, bringing over $800 million in client assets. Meanwhile, wealth platform Farther has expanded by adding the Greenside Team, formerly Livingworth Wealth Advisors, which manages approximately $185 million in client assets and specializes in retirement transitions.

feed.title: VARONIS SYSTEMS, INC. (NASDAQ: VRNS) SHAREHOLDER ALERT
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for Varonis Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: VRNS) investors, reminding them of an upcoming deadline in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Varonis made misrepresentations regarding its ability to convert existing customers to its SaaS offering, leading to reduced annual recurring revenue growth. Investors who purchased Varonis securities between February 4, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to inquire about their legal rights, with a lead plaintiff deadline set for March 9, 2026.

feed.title: Downriver organizations get a jolt from DTE funds
feed.summary: DTE Energy's Energy Efficiency Makeover Contest, celebrating its 10th anniversary, has awarded $5,000 to Union Second Baptist Church in River Rouge for facility upgrades. This program helps small businesses and non-profits, like past winner Penrickton Center for Blind Children, implement energy-saving improvements such as LED lighting and HVAC systems, leading to significant utility bill reductions and improved comfort. The initiative aims to break down barriers to energy efficiency for organizations lacking funds or knowledge, also offering free energy assessments and guidance.

feed.title: Basf and Eastman Chemical Financial Comparison

feed.title: Baird Upgrades Union Pacific (UNP), Raises Price Target to $311
feed.summary: Baird has upgraded Union Pacific (UNP) from Neutral to Outperform, with analyst Daniel Moore raising the price target to $311 from $239, a significant 30.13% increase. This upgrade indicates strong confidence in UNP's future performance, contrasting with some mixed past analyst reviews. Union Pacific is North America's largest public railroad, with operations across 30,000 miles of track in the western US and significant revenue from hauling various goods.

feed.title: Why Starbucks and other Fortune 500 companies choose Nashville, Middle TN
feed.summary: Starbucks recently announced its move to Nashville, joining other Fortune 500 companies like Oracle and Amazon. The company cited Nashville's "deep, talented and growing workforce" and its strategic location in the Southeast as key reasons for the expansion. Tennessee leaders highlighted the state's fiscally conservative approach, lack of state income tax, and various economic incentives as major attractions for businesses.

feed.title: News Corp updates daily disclosure on US$1bn 2025 repurchase program; spent ~US$95.4m to date
feed.summary: News Corp has updated its daily ASX disclosures regarding its 2025 repurchase program, which is authorized for up to US$1 billion in Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B stock. To date, the company has spent approximately US$95.4 million on repurchasing these shares. The company repurchased multiple tranches on March 5, 2026, totaling over 3.6 million shares.
